AwrukWins(a: seq<int>, k: int)\n{\n  k * |a| - Sum(a) > Sum(a)\n}\n\n// k is the smallest value that is both valid and winning\nghost predicate IsSmallestWinningK(a: seq<int>, k: int)\n  requires |a| forall i :: 0 <= i < |a| ==> a[i] >= 0\n  ensures IsSmallestWinningK(a, k)\n{\n  var s := 0;\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < |a|\n  {\n    s := s + a[i];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n\n  var m := a[0];\n  i := function Sum(a: seq<int>): int\n  decreases |a|\n{\n  if |a| == 0 then 0 else Sum(a[..|a|-1]) + a[|a|-1]\n}\n\n// k is valid: each student can give a[i] votes to Elodreip (needs k >= a[i])\nghost predicate ValidK(a: seq<int>, k: int)\n{\n  forall i :: 0 <= i < |a| ==> k >= a[i]\n}\n\n// Awruk wins: his total (k*n - sum(a)) strictly exceeds Elodreip's total (sum(a))\nghost predicate AwrukWins(a: seq<int>, k: int)\n{\n  k * |a| - Sum(a) > Sum(a)\n}\n\n// k is the smallest value that is both valid and winning\nghost predicate IsSmallestWinningK(a: seq<int>, k: int)\n  requires |a| > 0\n{\n  ValidK(a, k) && AwrukWins(a, k) &&\n  forall k' :: 0 <= k' < k ==> !(ValidK(a, k') && AwrukWins(a, k'))\n}\n\nlemma SumAppend(a: seq<int>, i: int)\n  requires 0 <= i < |a|\n  ensures Sum(a[..i+1]) == Sum(a[..i]) + a[i]\n{\n  assert a[..i+1][..i] == a[..i];\n}\n\nmethod Elections(a: seq<int>) returns (k: int)\n  requires |a| > 0\n  requires forall i :: 0 <= i < |a| ==> a[i] >= 0\n  ensures IsSmallestWinningK(a, k)\n{\n  var s := 0;\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < |a|\n    invariant 0 <= i <= |a|\n    invariant s == Sum(a[..i])\n  {\n    SumAppend(a, i);\n    s := s + a[i];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert a[..|a|] == a;\n\n  var m := a[0];\n  i := 1;\n  while i < |a|\n    invariant 1 <= i <= |a|\n    invariant forall j :: 0 <= j < i ==> m >= a[j]\n    invariant exists j :: 0 <= j < i && m == a[j]\n  {\n    if a[i] > m {\n      m := a[i];\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n\n  k := m;\n  while k * |a| - s <= s\n    invariant k >= m\n    invariant forall k' :: m <= k' < k ==> k' * |a| - s <= s\n    decreases 2 * s + |a| - k * |a|\n  {\n    k := k + 1;\n  }\n\n  assert ValidK(a, k);\n  assert AwrukWins(a, k);\n\n  forall k' | 0 <= k' < k\n    ensures !(ValidK(a, k') && AwrukWins(a, k'))\n  {\n    if k' < m {\n      var j :| 0 <= j < |a| && m == a[j];\n      assert !ValidK(a, k');\n    } else {\n      assert k' * |a| - s <= s;\n      assert !AwrukWins(a, k');\n    }\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":12049,"cache_read_input_tokens":18594,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":12049},"output_tokens":18,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"f476f723-7517-4c87-8bc2-a3bd985d13ea","uuid":"e7f699ca-0123-450d-b74a-116271a6e31b"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015z6XJFfhUfdFmdUegM3tBS","type":"tool_result","content":"File AwrukWins(a: seq<int>, k: int)\n{\n  k * |a| - Sum(a) > Sum(a)\n}\n\n// k is the smallest value that is both valid and winning\nghost predicate IsSmallestWinningK(a: seq<int>, k: int)\n  requires |a| > 0\n{\n  ValidK(a, k) && AwrukWins(a, k) &&\n  forall k' :: 0 <= k' < k ==> !(ValidK(a, k') && AwrukWins(a, k'))\n}\n\nlemma SumAppend(a: seq<int>, i: int)\n  requires 0 <= i < |a|\n  ensures Sum(a[..i+1]) == Sum(a[..i]) + a[i]\n{\n  assert a[..i+1][..i] == a[..i];\n}\n\nmethod Elections(a: seq<int>) returns (k: int)\n  requires |a| > 0\n  requires forall i :: 0 <= i < |a| ==> a[i] >= 0\n  ensures IsSmallestWinningK(a, k)\n{\n  var s := 0;\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < |a|\n    invariant 0 <= i <= |a|\n    invariant s == Sum(a[..i])\n  {\n    SumAppend(a, i);\n    s := s + a[i];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n  assert a[..|a|] == a;\n\n  var m := a[0];\n  i := 1;\n  while i < |a|\n    invariant 1 <= i <= |a|\n    invariant forall j :: 0 <= j < i ==> m >= a[j]\n    invariant exists j :: 0 <= j < i && m == a[j]\n  {\n    if a[i] > m {\n      m := a[i];\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n\n  k := m;\n  while k * |a| - s <= s\n    invariant k >= m\n    invariant forall k' :: m <= k' < k ==> k' * |a| - s <= s\n    decreases 2 * s + |a| - k * |a|\n  {\n    k := k + 1;\n  }\n\n  assert ValidK(a, k);\n  assert AwrukWins(a, k);\n\n  forall k' | 0 <= k' < k\n    ensures !(ValidK(a, k') && AwrukWins(a, k'))\n  {\n    if k' < m {\n      var j :| 0 <= j < |a| && m == a[j];\n      assert !ValidK(a, k');\n    } else {\n      assert k' * |a| - s <= s;\n      assert !AwrukWins(a, k');\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01G3onndRvWKdR5S46zFdGz3","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01LWviG7JPu4h456gpJEnBdf","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"/opt/homebrew/Cellar/dotnet@8/8.0.124/libexec/dotnet
